name: useTimeOutMessage
description: A hook for managing temporary messages that automatically clear after a specified interval, useful for success/error notifications.
usage_guidelines: Set message via returned setter function.
Customize interval based on message importance.

params.name: interval
params.description: Duration in milliseconds before message auto-clears.

return_value.description: Tuple with current message and setter function.

setMessage.description: Function to set new message (triggers auto-clear timer).

Dont: Don't forget to handle empty messages
